prerequisites: A HighLevel (GoHighLevel) account with access to the sub-account (location) you want to sync.
The sub-account API Key, found under Settings > Business Profile > General Information in the sub-account.
The Location ID for that sub-account, also shown under Settings > Business Profile > General Information.
A start date to define the earliest record the connector should sync from.

authMethods.name: API Key
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a sub-account (location) API Key. The key is sent as an Authorization: Bearer token on each request. Map this to the connector's api_key secret field. Generate or copy the key from the sub-account's Settings > Business Profile > General Information page.

setupSteps.title: Open the sub-account Business Profile settings
setupSteps.body: Log in to HighLevel and switch into the sub-account (location) you want to connect. Go to Settings > Business Profile > General Information, where both the API Key and Location ID for that sub-account are shown.

setupSteps.title: Copy the API Key
setupSteps.body: From Settings > Business Profile > General Information, copy the sub-account API Key. Provide this value as the api_key field. It is sent as an Authorization: Bearer token when the connector calls the HighLevel API.

setupSteps.title: Copy the Location ID
setupSteps.body: On the same General Information page, copy the Location ID, the unique identifier for the sub-account. Provide it as the location_id field so the connector scopes data to the correct sub-account.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Provide the start_date field to define the earliest point from which the connector should sync records.

sources.title: Business Profile Settings - HighLevel Support Portal
Developer's Glossary of Terms - HighLevel API (Authorization Bearer, Location ID, API Key)
